meta.title: Document Depot
meta.subtitle: Central library for carriers, compliance, marketing, and leadership resources.

emailProfiles.title: Leadership email setup
emailProfiles.description: Each leader has an iOS configuration profile (from GoDaddy or Microsoft 365) when available, plus server details for Android Samsung Email, Outlook, or other clients. Replace pending profiles by uploading the .mobileconfig file from your email host and setting status to "live" in documents.json.
emailProfiles.iphoneHelp: On iPhone or iPad: tap your profile link → Allow → open Settings → Profile Downloaded → Install. You may need your device passcode. There is no safe generic script that injects credentials; the profile file from your provider is the supported method.
emailProfiles.androidHelp: Android (e.g. Galaxy S24) does not use .mobileconfig. Use Samsung Email or Outlook with the server settings sheet, or follow your provider’s Android steps. Exchange accounts often auto-discover when you enter email and password in Outlook.

androidFlipTutorial.title: Kevin — Galaxy ‘BS 24’ email setup
androidFlipTutorial.subtitle: Flip each index card. Works on phone, tablet, or desktop browser.

steps.title: You’re on the right path
steps.body: Kevin — this walkthrough matches **Android** (your Galaxy **‘BS 24’** or any modern phone) and also works if you’re reading on a **laptop** so you can follow along on the phone.
steps.tip: Keep this page open while you work on the device where you’re installing mail.

steps.title: Install Outlook first
steps.body: Open **Google Play Store** → search **Microsoft Outlook** (Microsoft Corporation) → **Install**. Outlook is usually the smoothest route for **Microsoft 365** mail.
steps.tip: Samsung Email works too — we cover that in a later card.

steps.title: Add your work account
steps.body: Open **Outlook** → **Add account** → choose **Office 365** or **Exchange** if you see it → enter your **TPG work email** and continue.
steps.tip: If you don’t know the exact address, ask the team — it’s not always the same as your personal Gmail.

steps.title: Sign-in & MFA
steps.body: Complete **password** and any **multi-factor** prompt (Authenticator, text code, etc.) that your organization requires.
steps.tip: If sign-in loops, check date/time on the phone and try Wi‑Fi instead of cellular.

steps.title: If it asks for a server
steps.body: Some tenants need a hostname like **outlook.office365.com**. If you’re stuck, open the **server settings** file from the Document Depot in another tab or ask **technical** for the exact host.
steps.tip: Don’t guess passwords — use the reset flow from IT if needed.

steps.title: Samsung Email (Plan B)
steps.body: **Settings → Accounts and backup → Accounts → Add account → Exchange.** Use the same email and server details your admin provides.
steps.tip: Wording varies slightly by Android version — look for **Exchange** or **Microsoft**.

steps.title: You’re live
steps.body: Inbox should start filling within a few minutes. Pull down in Outlook to **refresh**. Welcome to mail that actually behaves on the **BS 24**.
steps.tip: Still broken? Screenshot the error and ping **technical** — that’s what we’re here for.
